name: Oatmeal Muffins-Daley
recipeInstructions:
Preheat the oven to 350°F.
Spray a 12-well muffin tin three times with the vegetable oil spray.
Put the egg whites in a large mixing bowl and whisk until frothy. Whisk in the maple syrup, orange juice, and milk. Add the vanilla, cinnamon, allspice, cloves, nutmeg, and orange zest. Whisk to blend.
Stir in the oats, flour, and baking powder with a wooden spoon. Fold in the pecans and dried cranberries.
Fill each muffin cup about two-thirds full with batter. Bake for 20 minutes, or until the muffins are firm in the center. Each muffin contains approximately 0.5 grams of fat and 128 calories.
